en.title: Web Development in Tallinn | e-Estonia's Tech Partner
en.description: Advanced web development in Tallinn. As a tech partner in e-Estonia, we build innovative and secure websites for a digital-first world.
en.h1: Digital-First Web Solutions for Tallinn's E-Governance Economy
en.p: AVPdev builds secure, API-driven Next.js applications and Telegram bots that align with Tallinn's world-leading digital infrastructure standards.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Tallinn
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Tallinn's e-governance and digital innovation, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Tallinn businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Tallinn?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
